entity.summary: Chicago-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in June 2019. Beaxy suspended operations on 2023-03-28, citing an uncertain regulatory environment. The following day, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission charged the platform and related parties with operating an unregistered exchange, broker, and clearing agency; settling parties agreed to shut down the platform and return customer assets.
entity.notes: HEI uses regulation because the exchange linked its immediate cessation to regulatory uncertainty and the SEC settlement required platform shutdown. The original beaxy.com domain now redirects to unrelated casino-review content.

events.title: Beaxy opened its cryptocurrency spot exchange
events.description: Beaxy began live cryptocurrency trading in June 2019 after a delayed launch process.
events.notes: The official announcement anticipated operation during Consensus 2019; contemporaneous reporting and exchange databases identify 2019-06-10 as the live launch.

events.title: Beaxy suspended services and ceased operations
events.description: Beaxy announced the immediate suspension of exchange services, stating that regulatory uncertainty made continued operation untenable.
events.notes: Used as the terminal operating date because the exchange's notice preceded the SEC charges by one day.

events.title: SEC charged Beaxy and settlement required platform shutdown
events.description: The U.S. SEC charged Beaxy and related parties with operating an unregistered exchange, broker, and clearing agency. Settling parties agreed to shut down the platform, account for customer assets, and return customer funds.
events.notes: The enforcement action formalized the shutdown after Beaxy's prior-day cessation notice.

evidence.title: Final Launch Announcement for Beaxy Exchange
evidence.notes: Primary pre-launch announcement stating that full operation was planned during the week of Consensus 2019.

evidence.title: Beaxy exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange profile identifies 2019-06-10 as the launch date and Chicago as the headquarters.

evidence.title: Beaxy exchange shutters after SEC presses multiple charges against founder, execs
evidence.notes: Preserves Beaxy's March 28 statement that operations were suspended because of regulatory uncertainty.

evidence.title: Crypto Exchange Beaxy Shuts Down Amid SEC Charges
evidence.notes: Independent confirmation of the exchange's cessation and stated regulatory rationale.

evidence.title: SEC Charges Crypto Trading Platform Beaxy and its Executives
evidence.notes: Primary regulatory source describing the charges and shutdown and asset-return undertakings.

evidence.title: Beaxy Digital, Ltd., et al.
evidence.notes: SEC litigation release confirming the enforcement case and alleged registration failures.
